comment.body:
since price is stochastic, not a simple thesis that above the centroid will go in a straight line to the upside pivot. For example Alma also wrote this in the morning note. 

"And above the centroid we have a pivotal range of a customer short spread at 6260/6270. This will be in effect after 10.40am"
